intent_concise: Perform magnetic bead separation, temperature control (4°C, 10°C), thermocycling. (volumes 20µL-200µL, ~61 min total)
intent: Alright, we'll be running the NEBNext Ultra II DNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina using the thermocycler module, magnetic module, and temperature module with plates in slots 1, 2, and 7, plus the reservoir in slot 2. Start by setting both temperature modules to 4°C, then we'll do the end repair and A-tailing (ERAT) step with a 60-minute incubation, followed by adapter ligation (LIG) for 15 minutes. Next, perform the first bead cleanup using the magnetic module with a gradual engagement from 8.5mm down to 5mm height over several minutes, transfer supernatant in 20µL aliquots with 6-second pauses between transfers, then resuspend beads in RSB buffer. Finally, run the PCR amplification (HSUPCR) for 60 minutes with 4 cycles, followed by a second AMPure cleanup using the same magnetic separation protocol, and elute the final libraries in RSB buffer after a 4-minute incubation at 5mm magnet height.

output_schema.protocol_name: NEBNext® Ultra™ II DNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina®
output_schema.author: Opentrons <protocols@opentrons.com>
